title: Bombun
description: Uma coelhinha bombástica defende sua fortaleza flutuante da sua antiga amiga, agora inimiga.

title: Darkwater
description: Darkwater é um jogo cooperativo de extração de terror para 1 a 4 jogadores. Comande um submarino preso sob o gelo numa lua alienígena. Lute contra embarcações inimigas e abominações subaquáticas enquanto busca recursos. Faça o possível para sobreviver.

title: Scritchy Scratchy
description: Scritchy Scratchy é um divertido jogo incremental de raspadinhas. Compre pilhas de raspadinhas, desbloqueie a raspagem automática e saia à caça dos grandes prêmios. Você vai pegar leve ou vai apostar tudo?

title: Grind Survivors
description: Grind Survivors é um roguelike de ação acelerado onde caçadores de demônios enfrentam hordas infinitas do inferno. Desvie, saqueie e detone em combates brutais de bullet-hell, com builds dinâmicos e armas sempre diferentes em um mundo devastado e tomado por demônios.

title: Dragonkin: The Banished
description: A ameaça dracônica está mais uma vez sobre nós. Heróis lendários surgem para enfrentar as legiões das profundezas. Domine seus dragonetes, crie construções de poder únicas com a Grade Ancestral, expanda sua cidade e destrua os Dragões!

title: Solo Leveling: ARISE OVERDRIVE
description: Solo Leveling, the webtoon with 14.3 billion views worldwide, is now an action RPG game! Help our hero grow from his humble E-Rank beginnings.

title: ARC Raiders
description: ARC Raiders é uma aventura multijogador de extração ambientada em uma Terra futurista e letal, arrasada por uma misteriosa ameaça mecanizada conhecida como ARC.

title: Dark Hours
description: Dark Hours é um jogo cooperativo de terror e sobrevivência de 1 a 4 jogadores. Seu assalto foi interrompido por um evento sobrenatural, e sua equipe está presa com uma entidade maligna. Esqueça o plano, a missão é sobreviver. Explorem e trabalhem para achar a saída.

title: Banana Drama
description: Banana Drama is an independent RTS game. It offers a singleplayer and online multiplayer experience. Your monkey king is held captive by evil dinos - he needs help! Be part of the banana crew and join us on Discord!

title: Immunica
description: Seja o sistema imunológico. Passe o cursor para matar. Armas disparam automaticamente. Gerencie seu laboratório, contrate cientistas e desenvolva uma vacina enquanto enfrenta hordas infinitas de patógenos.

title: MUKKE: Music Machine
description: Create mean beats and sick tracks from scratch with MUKKE's easy-to-learn music machine! Play around with a variety of sounds, instruments & tools to compose and record your own songs. Unleash your inner musician with this fresh new music game!

title: 6点之前
description: You are trapped in the new company by Lao Liu, and you need to carefully observe whether there are any abnormalities every day, make the right choice within the limited time, and break the cycle.

title: Emily's Desire
description: Help Emily fulfill her desire of conquering dungeon mazes. Embark on RPG Adventures in this Roguelite Auto Battler that rewards exploration and creativity. Gain collectible Victory Cards of Emily whenever you win!

title: Unreal Hospital 8
description: Nix, the handyman investigating disappearances at an abandoned hospital. This game is inspired by Exit 8 and is an Exit 8-like (Exit 8-esque) game. If you notice anything unusual, shoot and destroy it. If nothing seems amiss, proceed straight to the exit.

title: Godcraft Simulator
description: A game about shaping a world from the divine point of view. Build, refine, intervene - and discover that even gods have to deal with consequences. Ultimate simulator of God, where you decide who you help and what you create.

title: Slayer Mage: My First RPG - Support Pack (Art Included)
Territorial Conquest
description: Lidere sua nação em Territorial Conquest da Idade Média à Segunda Guerra Mundial e Era Moderna. Expanda fronteiras, construa exércitos, negocie, sabote inimigos e tome decisões políticas.

title: Lost Flame
description: Lost Flame is a modern roguelike game featuring unique and challenging turn-based combat. Find your way in the ruined kingdom of Hiraeth while fighting against legendary warriors of the past and spawn of the unfathomable Abysm.

title: Flora Corner
description: Flora Corner is a cozy idle game about growing houseplants and decorating your living space.

title: Buried Spirits - Minesweeper
description: A minesweeper game where you can use your magical abilities to deal with pesky odds. Save your concentration resource to speed up the process or get rid of tiebreakers. Mine your way through without disturbing the spirits.

title: Delivery Driver Massacre - Definitive Edition
description: A late-night delivery turns into a PSX nightmare. Trapped in a house with a killer, you must solve puzzles and hide to survive. Multiple endings and authentic VHS visuals. Can you escape the rot?

title: Parkour Paws
description: Explore parkour worlds alone or with friends. Push your limits in a Session with procedurally generated cities or climb the Challenge Paths. Collect Paws, customize your style, and prove you're the most skilled and stylish freerunner.

title: Pachincro
description: An action-packed pachinko–plinko incremental game with a massive skill tree and tons of upgrades. Drop balls, stack multipliers, unlock new abilities, watch the chaos scale into pure satisfaction, all while trying to defeat the boss and staying alive

title: Hyperinflation Dungeon
description: Hyperinflation Dungeon is a roguelike turn-based strategy card game built around explosive synergy and massive scaling. Use 500+ cards to create your own broken combos!

title: Rabbit Samurai
description: Rabbit Samurai is a turn-based deck-building roguelike! Battle vile foes, explore diverse locations, build a unique deck, and empower it with mighty relics! No repeated cards or runs — in this game, everything is unique!

title: Rebirth of Legal maniac 2 - DLC Transforms the Workplace
Rebirth of Legal maniac 2 - DLC The Bloodstained Academy of Organ "Donation"
Farm&Night
description: Arrange your defenses and crops during the day and acquire scattered treasures by defending against the swarming waves of zombies at night. With funds raised repeatedly over the course of seven days, go through the stage to the next level.

title: OKeverything with 3000 beauties 3 - DLC Vampire Despair City
OKeverything with 3000 beauties 3 - DLC Christmas Zombie Girlfriend
OKEverything X Myth: Super Sexy Fairy - DLC Vampire noblewoman
